solution.rawText:
We write the integral as powers of x and then integrate:

                                                            1

                                        = (2 ├Ч 8 тИТ 4 ├Ч 41 ) тИТ (2 ├Ч 1 тИТ 4 ├Ч 1)
                                        = 15 тИТ (тИТ2)
                                        = 17
